name: Job Completed Successfully
description: All requested services were completed according to specifications. Customer satisfied with work quality.

name: Partial Completion
description: Equipment issue prevented full completion. Customer rescheduled for remaining work.

name: No Access - Customer Unavailable
description: Customer was not available at scheduled time despite confirmation.

name: Equipment Malfunction
description: Technical equipment failure prevented service completion.

name: Customer Cancelled
description: Customer requested cancellation of scheduled service.
